programmes.show_description: Drama series. Channing threatens to close down the garden project. Jake takes steps to stop Will from exposing him. Bridget gets a reprimand for drunkenness.
Branches of an extended family lose each other on the eve of an important party, camp mascots Sparky the Shark and Dino the Dolphin need an upgrade, and there's a gardening competition.
Musical theatre performers Paul and Charlene await news on a new contract and a return next summer. Mark and his pooch rock up for a birthday getaway - but without a cake.
Paul Martin is in and around Sheffield as he takes on auctioneer and antiques expert Jessica Forrester. Items include an Edwardian writing desk and a vintage typewriter. (Ep51)

programmes.show_description: Rob and Ruth head back to wartime London to uncover how the Blitz was experienced by the rich and the poor. As the bombs rained down did your place in society keep you safe?

Drama series. Franky and Allie get some outside help with their escape plans. Will and Kaz try to persuade Allie to grass on Jake. Liz learns that Don Kaplan is missing.
Chunky the entertainer revisits his childhood passion for wrestling. Plus, the annual duck race in Looe, Cornwall, and a chocolate meltdown at Tencreek Holiday Park.
As the season comes to a close, Tencreek holidaymakers enjoy welly wanging, a knobbly knees contests and tug of war. But will heavy rain put a dampener on a firework display?
